goal: Restyle the HomeScreen '争鸣史' button to match the same art-textured style as the other three main entry buttons, using a distinct new color palette while preserving current behavior.
constraints: Do not change any navigation or game-state logic.
Apply visual style changes only to the HomeScreen story button block.
deliverables: HomeScreen story button uses the same art composition pattern as peer buttons.
Story button color scheme is visibly different from the other three buttons.
Button remains clickable and responsive with existing interactions.
